options.name: --listdfu
options.description: (Default: false) List connected DFU devices.

options.name: --dfuid
options.description:
ID of the DFU device to update. If not
specified the first connected DFU device will
be used.

options.name: --dfu
options.description: (Default: false) Use DFU to update the device.

options.name: --installdfudrivers
options.description: (Default: false) Install STM32 DFU drivers.

options.name: --jtagid
options.description:
ID of the JTAG device to update. If not
specified the first connected JTAG device will

options.name: --listjtag
options.description:
(Default: false) List connected STM32 JTAG
devices.

options.name: --hexfile
options.description:
HEX file(s) to be flashed into the device.
Only JTAG connected targets are supported.

options.name: --binfile
options.description: BIN file(s) to be flashed into the device.

options.name: --jtag
options.description:
(Default: false) Use JTAG to update the
device.

options.name: --installjtagdrivers
options.description: (Default: false) Install STM32 JTAG drivers.

options.name: --serialport
options.description: Serial port where device is connected to.

options.name: --baud
options.description:
(Default: 1500000) Baud rate to use for the
serial port.

options.name: --flashmode
options.description: (Default: dio) Flash mode to use.

options.name: --flashfreq
options.description: (Default: 40) Flash frequency to use [MHz].

options.name: --partitiontablesize
options.description:
Partition table size to use. Valid sizes are:
2, 4, 8 and 16.

options.name: --checkpsram
options.description:
(Default: false) Perform check for PSRAM in
device.

options.name: --nobackupconfig
options.description:
(Default: false) Skip backup of configuration
partition.

options.name: --installxdsdrivers
options.description: (Default: false) Install XDS110 drivers.

options.name: --listjlink
options.description:
(Default: false) List connected USB J-Link
devices.

options.name: --jlinkid
options.description:
ID of the J-Link device to update. If not
specified the first connected J-Link device
will be used.

options.name: --setvcpbr
options.description:
Set baud rate of J-Link Virtual COM Port. If a
value is not specified it will use the default
value for Wire Protocol.

options.name: --nanodevice
options.description:
(Default: false) Operations are to be
performed to a nanoFramework device.

options.name: --clrfile
options.description: Path to file with CLR image.

options.name: --target
options.description:
Target name. This is the target name used in
the GitHub and Cloudsmith repositories.

options.name: --platform
options.description:
Target platform. Acceptable values are: esp32,
stm32, cc13x2, efm32.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
(Default: n) Sets the verbosity level of the
command. Allowed values are q[uiet],
m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and
diag[nostic]. Not supported in every command;
see specific command page to determine if this
option is available.

options.name: --backuppath
options.description: Path where to store the backup file.

options.name: --backupfile
options.description:
Backup file name. Just the file name without
path. If the file name isn't provided one will
be generated.

options.name: --fwversion
options.description: Firmware version to flash the device with.

options.name: --update
options.description:
(Default: false) Update the device firmware
using the other specified options.

options.name: --deploy
options.description:
(Default: false) Flash a deployment image
specified with --image.

options.name: --preview
options.description:
(Default: false) Download a firmware package
from the preview repository that includes
major changes or experimental features.

options.name: --image
options.description:
Path to deployment image file to be uploaded
to device.

options.name: --masserase
options.description:
(Default: false) Mass erase the device flash
before uploading the firmware. If more than
one file is specified to be flashed the mass
erase will be performed before the first file
is flashed.

options.name: --address
options.description:
Address(es) where to flash the BIN file(s).
Hexadecimal format (e.g. 0x08000000). Required
when specifying a BIN file with --binfile
argument or flashing a deployment image with

options.name: --reset
options.description:
(Default: false) Perform reset on connected
device after all other requested operations
are successfully performed.

options.name: --nofitcheck
options.description:
(Default: false) Skip execution of sanity
check if the requested target fits the
connected device. This is a best effort
validation and it's NOT guaranted to be fail
safe.

options.name: --listtargets
options.description:
(Default: false) List the available targets
and versions. --platform and --preview options
apply.

options.name: --listports
options.description:
(Default: false) List the all the COM ports on
this machine.

options.name: --clearcache
options.description:
(Default: false) Clear the cache folder with
firmware images.

options.name: --listdevices
options.description:
(Default: false) List the .NET nanoFramework
devices connected to the machine.

options.name: --devicedetails
options.description:
(Default: false) Reads details from connected
device.

options.name: --identifyfirmware
options.description:
(Default: false) Show which firmware to use
for a device without deploying anything.

options.name: --filedeployment
options.description: JSON file containing file deployment settings.

options.name: --networkdeployment
options.description:
JSON file containing network deployment
settings.

options.name: --archivepath
options.description:
Path of the directory where the firmware is
archived.

options.name: --updatearchive
options.description:
(Default: false) Copy the firmware from the
online repository to the firmware archive
directory; do not update the firmware on a
connected device.

options.name: --fromarchive
options.description:
(Default: false) Get the firmware from the
firmware archive rather than from the online
repository.

options.name: --suppressnanoffversioncheck
options.description:
(Default: false) Do not check whether a new
version of nanoff is available.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
